title: Binding
description: A relationship/data-movement contract realized by a Provider. spec.mode fixes which Kinds sourceRef/targetRef may resolve to (cdc: Source→EventStream, sink: EventStream→Dataset) and which provider capability is checked at validate time.

mode.description: batch is schema-reserved and rejected by validation in v1.

providerRef.description: Must implement the capability interface matching spec.mode (CDCCapableProvider / SinkCapableProvider).

options.description: Mode/provider-specific options (e.g. cdc: tables, snapshotMode, databaseHostname/databasePort for external sources).
